calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-25-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Pro Tem Judge Joseph Jedeikin, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record:
Angela D. Warren, Esq. appears for respondent Boris Houri, Jim Austin & Allessandra Clark appear as appeallant's in Pro Per.
Cause called for small claims appeal. Ms. Warren asks the court for a continuance. After some discussion the request is denied. Ms. Warren then asks to withdraw and be excused from the case. Her oral motion is granted. Case continues without the respondent. Mr. Houri and Ms. Allessandra, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Mr. Darrell Moore, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative.
10:10AM
Matter is submitted, Court adjourns.
